products.title: Twisted Lily Best Sellers Sample Pack
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
At Twisted Lily, we pride ourselves on vetting and curating the finest fragrances for our customers. With our Best Sellers Sample Pack, we're making it easy to discover the best of the best. Consider it a one-stop shop to smell the fragrances that get all the love! This set is periodically updated, so continue to check and see if you've snagged the latest curation.

INCLUDES

1. MAISON CRIVELLI Hibiscus Mahajad Extrait: Hibiscus Mahajad combines bold hibiscus and rose with gentle vanilla, leather, and musk, inspired by hibiscus tea in a gemstone market.

2. VILHELM PARFUMERIE Poets of Berlin: A tribute to David Bowie and his time in Berlin embodied in a bold collision of blueberry, lemon, bamboo, green wild orris and Haitian vetiver.

3. JUSBOX PERFUMES Carioca Heart: A vibrant tale of love, rhythm, and resilience set against the colorful backdrop of Rio de Janeiro — a fragrance that pulses with sunlit citrus, tropical florals, and warm, sultry woods. [New to assortment]

4. MANCERA PARFUMS Amore Caffe: An addictive affogato-inspired blend of rich espresso, vanilla, ambery woods, and brown sugar, creating a warm, bold, and elegant gourmand scent. [New to assortment]

5. ROJA Elysium Parfum Cologne: A virtuous ultra-fresh blend of citrus, musk, and woods that draws the world to its charm

6. MONTALE PARFUMS Arabians Tonka: Arabians Tonka blends spicy notes, roses, tonka bean, and bergamot with oud, amber, and musk, creating a daring, subtly feminine tribute to the Arabian horse. 

7. FUGAZZI Angel Dust Extrait: A daring blend of smoky white amber, smooth cashmeran, and sharp peppercorn, leaving a trail of unapologetic intensity.  [New to assortment]

8. CASAMORATI Dama Bianca: A romantic white fragrance, where vanilla’s dreamy allure entwines with kumquat, iris, and soft blossoms, settling into a tender, powdery embrace. [New to assortment]

9. MATIERE PREMIERE Vanilla Powder: Vanilla Powder is a long-lasting, modern reimagining of vanilla that is elevated with coconut powder, palo santo, and sandalwood. [New to assortment]

10. ETAT LIBRE D'ORANGE Story of Your Life: Where the warmth of rum, soft brioche, and rich vanilla mingle with cocoa and orange blossom, inviting you into a world of nostalgia and comfort.  [New to assortment]

11. XERJOFF Torino 21: Fresh and sophisticated, combining the green and aromatic benefits of mint, basil, thyme, and rosemary. [New to assortment]

12. MAISON FRANCIS KURKDJIAN Baccarat Rouge 540: Poetic alchemy of amber, floral, and woody breeze on the skin. A sophisticated signature with an unforgettable scent trail.

13. Incentivized coupon to use towards your full-size purchase.

Following receipt of your order, please look for an email containing a redeemable coupon to use towards your full-size purchase!

*Curation updated 05/2025

products.title: Essential Parfums Discovery Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Explore the complete collection of Essential Parfums' eaux de parfums at home and discover the exceptional creations created by the greatest perfumers of our time.

INCLUDES
Vetiver Iris: VELVETY . WOODY . CARNAL . 
Néroli Botanica: ANDROGYNOUS . SOLAR . VIBRANT . 
Patchouli Mania: INTOXICATING . TASTY . CHIC
Bois Impérial: SENSUAL . WOODY . FRESH
Divine Vanille: ADDICTIVE . CHIC . SEDUCTION
Fig Infusion: LUMINOUS . SOOTHING . DELICIOUS
Nice Bergamote: SUNNY . CITRUS . SPARKLING
Orange X Santal: RADIANT . SENSUAL . JOYFUL
Mon Vetiver: ELEGANT . AROMATIC . MODERN
Rose Magnetic: SENSUOUS . WOODY . CAPTIVATING
The Musc: ENCHANTING . FLORAL . WARM

Essential Parfums' perfumers prioritize natural, sustainable raw materials for powerful fragrances that respect communities and the environment. Essential Parfums' fragrances are 86%-93% natural and use beetroot-derived alcohol without added coloring within their formulas. Outer packaging consists of FSC-certified recycled paper, free of plastic, to minimize environmental impact.

products.title: Twisted Lily x After Hours
products.body_html:
"It’s officially After Hours at Twisted Lily! We’re so excited to be teaming up with Twisted Lily to talk about these new & exciting launches with you! We hope you find a new favorite for the summer. - Xoxoxo, Em&Em"

SAMPLE SET INCLUDES: 

  1. Essential Parfums Neroli Botanica: A spicy, vibrant scent of ginger and pepper that softens into floral orange blossom and jasmine, finishing with warm vetiver and sandalwood.
  2. Maison Crivelli Musc Nurāsana Extrait: A luminous musky fragrance blending rose damascena and incense over a soft, resinous, floral trail with a warm, meditative depth.
  3. Casamorati Tempio d’Acqua: A floral-fruity fragrance inspired by the calming beauty of an Italian natural spa, blending bright citrus, soft florals, and warm resinous notes into a tranquil escape.
  4. ROJA Serenity Blend: A refined tea-inspired fragrance that blends bright citrus, delicate florals, and warm black tea accords to capture the elegance and ritual of traditional tea culture.
  5. Fugazzi Orange Crush EDP: A soft, velvety fragrance built around orange, white amber, and transparent woods, creating a fresh yet warm scent that gently intensifies on the skin.

products.title: Une Nuit Nomade Extrait Discovery Kit
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Night. The mind wanders. Our eyes rest on the moon’s glow. The silence of the sleeping world excites our imagination. Here we find enchanted lands, magic, and mystery. And legends. We go from story to story, changing destinations, heroes, and landscapes.

Une Nuit Nomade's collection of ‘Extraits de Voyage’ is a scent exploration of these real and imagined stories, passed down from generation to generation.

The Discovery Kit Extraits features 3 fragrances in 2.5 ml : Jardins de Misfah Extrait, Estrella de la Mañana and the new release Chemin d'Amande

products.title: Vilhelm 10 Year Anniversary Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Vilhelm invites you to celebrate 10-year anniversary with the brand, a wonderful journey Vilhelm has been on since 2015.

Dear Polly

Tea for two in the morning

Distance is nothing to the heart: The scent of black tea, brewed just how she likes it, and the crispiness of morning light, slowly easing away the night that still clings to the senses. Ceylon black tea immediately warms the skin while sensuous musk simmers below.

Poets of Berlin 

 Berlin, a city that is alive with the same kinetic, magnetic energy that attracted David Bowie for a few formative, recuperative and prolific years in the Seventies. Perpetual creative movement embodied in a bold collision of blueberry, lemon, bamboo, green wild orris and Haitian vetiver. 

INCLUDES 
Dear Polly 100ml + Poets of Berlin 10ml

Each expresses a new facet of personality and embodies a mood, a style, a state of mind and more. This women's set is a perfect fragrance wardrobe where every woman will find a scent to dress her skin. An original gift idea.

INCLUDESS

Gentle Fluidity Gold: Amber

products.title: Juliette Has A Gun Holiday Gift Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Designed to make the holiday season extra special, this gift set gives you 3 products for the price of a 100ml. Girl math says: it’s a total win!

Juliette has a gun's most generous offer featuring the bestselling Not a Perfume. This exclusive set includes

- a full-size 100ml bottle,

- a 7.5ml travel spray, and

- a 30ml mini body lotion,

all infused with the iconic scent of Not a Perfume. This fragrance adapts to everyone differently and is perfect for layering or wearing on its own.

products.title: Baccarat Rouge 540 Precious Elixir Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
The incomparable Baccarat Rouge 540 extrait de parfum releases its woody, amber, floral sillage in a new, sensual fragrance ritual.

Presented in an elegant, travel-friendly roll-on 4 ml case, this precious elixir can be applied to the inside of the wrist and crook of the elbow, the nape of the neck, the hairline, or the cleavage, unveiling the luminous and inimitable sillage of Baccarat Rouge 540.

NOTES
Cashmeran, AmbroxanTM, Grandiflorum Jasmine, Saffron

products.title: Amore Caffè Gift Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Indulge in decadent luxury with the Mancera Holiday Gourmands Gift Set, the ultimate treat for lovers of rich, gourmand fragrances. This exquisite set pairs Amore Caffè and Xplicit Vanilla, offering a journey through indulgent coffee, creamy vanilla, Mexican chocolate and deep, seductive notes.

Amore Caffè (120ml + 8ml) draws inspiration from the blissful Italian tradition of pouring hot espresso over a scoop of vanilla ice cream. Experience the ebb and flow between astringent cafe noir and lush sweet cream, lifted with hints of Amaretto and Speculoos, on a base of Grey Amber, Vanilla Pod, and Brown Sugar. Amore Caffe is a decadent harmony of contrasts that delivers full, irresistible satisfaction.

Xplicit Vanilla (8ml) is bold, earthy, and captivating. This gourmand fragrance blends Mexican Vanilla and Chocolate Accord at the top, heart notes of Brown Sugar, Oud, Sandalwood, and Cedarwood, and a base of Tonka Bean, Amber, and Benzoin, leaving a warm, irresistible trail that lingers.

Decadently indulgent. Utterly unforgettable. Mancera Holiday Gourmands Gift Set is your signature gourmand escape this season.

INCLUDES
Amore Caffè 120ml EDP + Amore Caffè 8ml EDP + Xplicit Vanilla 8ml EDP

products.title: Montale Arabians Tonka Gift Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Arabians Tonka, intended for lovers of rare perfumes, is the complice of Arabians, a tribute fragrance to the Arabic Horse. A fine blend of spiced volutes, bewitching Roses, Tonka Bean and Bergamot reveal an animal temperament of Oud, Amber and Musk. An audacious, racy and fiery fragrance, with an almost feminine look.

INCLUDES
Arabians Tonka 100ml EDP + Arabians Tonka 20ml

products.title: Baccarat Rouge 540 Ritual Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
A brand new exclusive offer for this holiday season, with an authentic olfactory signature, Baccarat Rouge 540 releases its bright and floral scent within a perfume ritual set composed of an eau de parfum, a scented body oil, and a scented hair mist. Through three gestures, this ritual perfumes the skin and the hair with the floral, ambery, and woody notes of Baccarat Rouge 540.

INCLUDES
1 × 35ML Baccarat Rouge 540 Eau De Parfum
1 × 35ML Baccarat Rouge 540 Scented Body Oil
1 × 35ML Baccarat Rouge 540 Scented Hair mist

products.title: Jusbox Greatest Hits Kit
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
A sensorial experience among the most loved olfactory and musical notes of Jusbox Perfumes.

The compilation contains six mini spray in 1.5 ml format, the best way to discover and test our best-selling fragrances and choose the one that best represents your inner personality.

Let yourself be carried away by the poetry of Beat Cafè, be conquered by the power of Black Powder, be enchanted by the floral notes of Feather Supreme and Siren & Sailors; have fun and let loose with the pure energy of Micro Love and Cheeky Smile.

INCLUDES
Beat Cafè, Black Powder, Cheeky Smile, Micro Love, Feather Supreme, Siren & Sailors

products.title: Xerjoff XJ Discovery Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Discover three of the multi-faceted Xerjoff complex blends that uninhibitedly combines quality and heritage with a modern twist. This set includes three 15ml miniature flacons of Naxos, Erba Pura and La Capitale. 

INCLUDES
Erba Pura: Fruity, Floral
Naxos: Woody, Gourmand
La Capitale: Fruity, Gourmand

products.title: D.S. & DURGA Road Trip Hits
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
For your car. Closet. Bus. Submarine.
Keep it Fresh. 5 auto fragrances.

INCLUDES
Big Sur After Rain: Coastal eucalyptus groves
Concrete After Lightning: August storms in the city
Wild Brooklyn Lavender: Wild herbs along sidewalks
Portable Fireplace: Smoky woods in the hearth
’85 Diesel: Saffron tanned leather, diesel fumes

products.title: Instant Crush Gift Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
The perfect holiday set has arrived. Indulge in irresistible romance with Mancera's Instant Crush Holiday Gift Set, the ultimate treat for lovers of sensual, floral-amber fragrances. This luxurious set pairs Instant Crush and Intense Instant Crush, offering an elegant yet magnetic journey through roses, jasmine, amber, and warm, hypnotic gourmand notes.

Instant Crush (120ml + 8ml) is a wave of elegance and charm, blending Citrus Fruits, Saffron, and Ginger at the top, a heart of Moroccan Rose, Egyptian Jasmine, and Precious Amber, and a sensual base of Sandalwood, Oakmoss, Vanilla, and White Musk. Mancera’s #1 bestseller worldwide. This fragrance is the ultimate “crush” in a bottle.

Intense Instant Crush (8ml) amplifies the allure of the eau de parfum. Darker, bolder, and more hypnotic, this intense version opens with Indian Saffron, Black Leather, Bergamot, and Mandarin. It flows into a heart of Rose, Precious Amberwood, Patchouli Leaves, and Salted Caramel, and settles on a base of Mysore Sandalwood, Vanilla Pods, Oakmoss, and White Musk. Powerful, addictive, and magnetic, it leaves a trail that lingers like an obsession.

This set includes both the Eau de Parfum and Extrait de Parfum of Instant Crush, Mancera’s bestseller. Perfect for romantic evenings, special occasions, or gifting a crush-worthy fragrance.

INCLUDES
Instant Crush 120ml EDP + Instant Crush 8ml EDP + Intense Instant Crush 8ml EDP

products.title: Roja Isola Travel Collection
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Allow ROJA to whisk you away to the far-off shores of an olfactive dreamland. In an instance, a single spritz will transport the senses to a luxurious island vacation few have the means to make a reality.

The Isola Collection embodies the meeting of a place’s soul and the creator’s inspiration. ISOLA BLU, ISOLA SOL, OCEANIA and the latest olfactory escape, ISOLA VERDE, invite you to explore dreamlike horizons. A chic Mediterranean retreat or a golden-sand paradise, each creation is a sensory journey, a luxurious destination to captivate your senses.

INCLUDES
Isola Verde: Floral, Fruity
Isola Blu: Citrus, Fresh
Isola Sol: Solar, Floral Amber
Oceania: Amber, Marine

products.title: Maison Francis Kurkdjian Wardrobe Set for Him
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
An invitation to browse through the range of expressions, this Maison Francis Kurkdjian fragrance wardrobe for men presents a fine selection of sleek men’s fragrances. Consisting of eight 11ml perfume refills to explore the different facets of the Maison Francis Kurkdjian fragrance creations: fresh and clean eau de toilette, intense and vibrant eau de parfum, elegant and urban extrait de parfum.

INCLUDES
APOM: Floral
Aqua Media Cologne Forte: Aromatic Fougère
724: Soft Floral
Amyris Homme: Aromatic, Woody
l'Homme À la rose: Floral, Fresh
Gentle Fluidity Silver Edition: Green, Aromatic
Baccarat Rouge 540: Amber
Grand Soir: Amber

products.title: Vilhelm Gold Collection Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
The Vilhelm Parfumerie Gold Collection 10x10ml Set offers an exquisite journey through the brand's bestselling fragrances. Featuring 10 signature scents, each in a 10ml travel-friendly size, this set showcases the diverse and imaginative world of Vilhelm Parfumerie.

From the invigorating brightness of Morning Chess to the delicate florals of Dear Polly, and the sultry warmth of Poets of Berlin, this collection has been carefully curated to include fan favorites. Whether you're exploring Vilhelm's fragrances for the first time or expanding your personal collection, the Bestsellers Set is the ultimate way to experience a range of olfactory moods, beautifully packaged in Vilhelm's iconic yellow. Perfect for gifting or indulgence.

INCLUDES
Dear Polly: Amber, Musk
Back to The Roots: Soft Floral
Faces of Francis: Woody Amber
Opus Kore: Floral Amber
125th & Bloom: Floral Amber
Black Citrus: Mossy Woods
Basilico & Fellini: Fresh, Green
Room Service: Floral, Clean
Mango Skin: Fruity, Floral
Morning Chess: Green, Fresh

products.title: Andrea Maack Extrait Discovery Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Our Extrait de Parfum discovery set features 3 x 2 ml vials of our Extrait collection: Pavilion, Magma & Solstice

INCLUDES
Pavilion: Floral, Gourmand
Magma: Floral, Chypre
Solstice: Fruity, Aquatic

products.title: Baccarat Rouge 540 Extrait Travel Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
The Baccarat Rouge 540 extrait de parfum augments the strength and radiance of the fragrance’s amber woody floral aura. In this exalted version of a signature scent, jasmine blossoms and woody musks engage in an alchemy of the senses. A profusion and fusion of the elements that can only be tamed by the art of the perfumer and time-tested wisdom.

NOTES
 Grandiflorum jasmine from Egypt, Saffron, Bitter almond from Morocco
Cedar wood, Musky woody accord, Ambergris

Set Includes:
5 x 11ml Sprays of Baccarat Rouge 540 EXTRAIT
Globe Trotter Case

products.title: Montale Lucky Candy Gift Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Wearing Lucky candy is like drawing a tarot card that continually unveils a delicious surprise. When the marshmallow pops up, you know you’re in for a treat .. your wheel of fortune has appeared. Bergamot and honey commence this sweet celebration, joined by a dollop of coconut cream. Then enters frangipani flower, which raises this scent to another level of delectation. Follow this with a creamy caramel wave of amber and musk kissed by vanilla and sweet toffee. Say hello to your new lucky charm.

INCLUDES
Lucky Candy 100ml EDP + Lucky Candy 20ml

products.title: Akro Gourmand Kit
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Cupcakes. Caffeine. Summer.

Discover Akro's three luxurious gourmand perfumes in three 10ml travel sizes.

Addictions turned into perfumes, stoppered bottles of undiluted and addictive excess, to be consumed without moderation.

INCLUDES
BAKE is an addictive cupcake fragrance
AWAKE is an addictive coffee fragrance
RISE is an addictive summer fragrance

THE FRAGRANCE

Deluxe 8-sample set, this discovery set presents the perfect opportunity to discover our creations, or to let a loved one discover them.

The set contains 2 ml samples of the 8 EDP perfumes in our collection.

INCLUDES
Dual: Citrus, Woody
Craft: Aldehydic, Woody

Lightsource: Fresh, Citrus

products.title: Baccarat Rouge 540 Travel Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Luminous and sophisticated, Baccarat Rouge 540 lays on the skin like an amber, floral and woody breeze. A poetic alchemy. A graphic and highly condensed signature.

NOTES
Jasmine, Saffron, Cedar wood, Ambergris

Baccarat Rouge 540 Gift Set Includes:
5 x 11ml Sprays
Globe Trotter Case

products.title: Fugazzi Holiday Eau De Parfum Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
The Eau de Parfum Set

Celebrate the season with two of Fugazzi’s most coveted scents - Angel Dust & Vanilla Haze - in perfectly giftable 15ml sizes

Fugazzi's bestselling fragrances! A dreamy duo of creamy warmth, perfect for the holiday season.

Angel Dust
Vanilla Haze

products.title: Ex Nihilo Quintessence Discovery Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
The SELECTION QUINTESSENCE Discovery Set brings together EX NIHILO’s iconic creations in their most intense and sophisticated expression. Designed as an introduction to our olfactory universe, it allows you to explore our fragrances through six 2mL mini formats crafted for discovery.

These Extraits de parfum embody the spirit of the House through bold compositions crafted with the finest raw materials of Haute Parfumerie, in complete creative freedom.

An invitation to dive into the world of EX NIHILO and create your future scented memories.

This set includes the Extraits de parfum from the QUINTESSENCE Collection: FLEUR NARCOTIQUE, OUTCAST BLUE, BLUE TALISMAN (x2), GOLD IMMORTALS, and THE HEDONIST.

products.title: Atelier des Ors White Discovery Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
Experience five Atelier Des Ors scents, including three fragrances from the White Collection, one fragrance from the Eaux Collection, and one fragrance from the Riviera Collection. 

INCLUDES
Nuda Veritas: Floral, Fresh
Choeur des Anges: Floral
Pomelo Riviera: Citrus
Blanc Polychrome: Aromatic, Citrus
Riviera Lazuli: Woody, Aromatic

products.title: BDK Parfums Les Miniatures Coffret
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
A collector’s treasure, this 5 x 10ml curated set with splash application invites you to explore a diverse palette of scents, each a tribute to the timeless allure of Parisian style. Inspired by both the city’s distinctive energy and the personalities encountered within its bounds, these creations reflect the essence of Paris. Each perfume in the Collection Parisienne tells a story, capturing a moment that transports us through the diverse neighborhoods of Paris. Inspired by both the city’s distinctive energy and the personalities encountered within its bounds.

INCLUDES
Bouquet de Hongrie: Floral
Pas ce Soir: Mossy Woods
Rouge Smoking: Floral Amber
Gris Charnel: Woody Amber
312 Saint-Honoré: Floral Amber

products.title: Liis Unseen Collection Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
A curated set inspired by inner worlds.

INCLUDES
Bo: White Cedar, Incense, Vanilla Beans
Studied: Ambrette, Pear, Orris, Ambroxan
Ethereal Wave: Cardamom, Black Tea, Velvet Musk

Liis is made from exceptionally high quality, conscious ingredients from around the world and organic sugarcane alcohol. Formulated without preservatives, dyes, phthalates, sulfates, Liis is cruelty-free, vegan, and allergy-tested.

products.title: Vilhelm Lucky Yellow Set
products.body_html:
THE FRAGRANCE
The Lucky Yellow Set includes three 10mls of Vilhelm Parfumerie’s most captivating scents. Encased in signature yellow packaging, this set offers an uplifting sensory journey, perfect for those seeking an opportunity to experience more of the Vilhelm Parfumerie collection or as a gift for a loved one.

INCLUDES
Morning Chess, a vibrant blend of bergamot, leather, and patchouli that evokes the freshness of a sunny Swedish summer day.
Sparkling Jo, a lively and effervescent champagne fragrance with bright citrus notes that embody the joy of spontaneous moments
Faces of Francis, an enchanting fusion of saffron, oud and pistachio, capturing the artistry in Francis Bacon’s work.

products.body_html:

THE FRAGRANCE
